description: Pay-per-fetch via x402. Agent pays 0.005 USDC, gets clean markdown for any URL. No API keys.
name: io.github.Drock91/bitbooth-fetch

environmentVariables.description: Hex-encoded private key for the agent wallet that pays USDC. Testnet by default (Base Sepolia) — set BITBOOTH_CHAIN_ID=8453 to use Base mainnet.
environmentVariables.name: BITBOOTH_AGENT_KEY

environmentVariables.description: BitBooth gateway URL. Defaults to the staging endpoint on Base Sepolia.
environmentVariables.name: BITBOOTH_API_URL

environmentVariables.description: EVM chain ID. Defaults to 84532 (Base Sepolia testnet). Set to 8453 for Base mainnet (spends real USDC).
environmentVariables.name: BITBOOTH_CHAIN_ID
